title: Map: The plans below show how the ground of a particular building has changed over time
description: The plans below show how the ground of a particular building has changed over time. Summarize the information by selecting and reporting the main features.
guide_html:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

– MAP (3 giai đoạn)

1\. Giải thích đề

Sơ đồ cho thấy sự thay đổi chức năng của một tòa nhà qua 3 giai đoạn:

  • 1958–1984: office
  • 1985–2000: apartment
  • 2001–present: flower shop

→ Dạng: map – multiple time periods (3 stages)

2\. Introduction (paraphrase)

Dùng cấu trúc:

The diagrams illustrate how a building was used for different purposes between 1958 and the present day.*
3\. Overview (ý chính)
  • Tòa nhà trải qua 3 lần chuyển đổi chức năng lớn
  • Từ văn phòng → căn hộ → cửa hàng hoa
  • Bố cục bên trong thay đổi đáng kể theo từng mục đích sử dụng
  • Một số khu vực (như kitchen / entrance) vẫn giữ vị trí tương đối ổn định
4\. Chia BODY
BODY 1 – Giai đoạn 1958–1984 (Office)
  • Bên trái:
  • Meeting room
  • Assistant’s office
  • Secretary’s office
  • Toilet
  • Bên phải:
  • Kitchen
  • Manager office
  • Reception area (gần entrance)

→ Ý chính: bố cục phục vụ làm việc hành chính, nhiều phòng chức năng riêng biệt

BODY 2 – Giai đoạn 1985–2000 (Apartment)
  • Bên trái:
  • Living room
  • Bathroom and shower
  • Bên phải:
  • Kitchen
  • Bedroom 1
  • Bedroom 2

→ Ý chính: chuyển thành không gian sinh hoạt, ít phòng hơn nhưng diện tích lớn hơn

BODY 3 – 2001–Present (Flower shop)
  • Bên trái:
  • Gift cards
  • Play area
  • Trung tâm:
  • Flower display area
  • Bên phải:
  • Kitchen (giữ nguyên vị trí tương đối)
  • Office
  • Flower section

→ Ý chính: chuyển sang mục đích thương mại, không gian mở và phục vụ khách hàng

5\. Từ vựng nên dùng
  • be converted into → được chuyển đổi thành
  • undergo significant changes → trải qua thay đổi lớn
  • be replaced by → được thay thế bởi
  • remain unchanged → giữ nguyên
  • be repurposed → được tái sử dụng
  • layout → bố cục

The diagrams show how a building was used for different purposes between 1958 and the present.

Overall, the building changed from an office to a residential apartment and is now a flower shop, with each stage involving a complete reorganisation of internal space.

Between 1958 and 1984, the building functioned as an office. It contained several work-related rooms, including a meeting room, manager’s office, assistant’s office, and secretary’s office. Supporting facilities such as a kitchen, toilet, and reception area were also provided, all arranged around a central layout.

From 1985 to 2000, the building was converted into an apartment. The internal structure was simplified to suit residential use, with a living room occupying a large central area. Two bedrooms were added on the right, while the kitchen was positioned in the upper section. A bathroom and shower replaced the office facilities on the left.

Since 2001, the building has been used as a flower shop. The space is now divided into functional retail areas, including a flower display zone in the centre, a play area, and a section for gift cards. A kitchen and office are located on the right-hand side, reflecting both commercial and operational needs.
